应付款（网银） 应付款（票据） 预付款（网银） 预付款（票据）

<model > <extendElementProperty name="fd_applicant" label="采购项目付款申请人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_apply_dept" label="申请部门" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_applicant_id" label="申请人工号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_applicant_phone" label="联系电话" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_apply_post" label="岗位" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" notNull="true" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentPost()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_POST);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_payment_milestone" label="付款阶段" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_project_manager" label="项目的经理" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_sci" label="是否为科研费用1" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|2" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3a1e75dab2a618" label="采购项目是否完工" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|2" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3b4ec96ec9b8e2" label="是否属于三重一大" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|2" type="Double" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_name" label="合同名称 " type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_no" label="合同编号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_xpm_id" label="XPM编号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_htz" label="是否有wbs" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_haswbs" label="是否有WBS" notNull="true" enumValues="是|YES;否|NO" type="String" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_pur_pay_req" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3bd52b0e2e75a0" label="项目编号" type="String" length="24" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="wbsCode" label="WBS编号" type="String" notNull="true" /><extendSimpleProperty name="wbsCode_name" label="WBS编号_name" type="String" notNull="true" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3be1c0f5e287c2" label="项目名称" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="department" label="WBS所属部门" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="departmentCode" label="WBS所属部门Code" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_internal_order" label="内部订单号" type="String" length="12" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pm" label="项目经理" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pmid" label="项目经理工号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_tax_total" label="含税金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_name" label="收款人/收款单位名称" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_bank" label="收款人/收款单位银行账号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_account" label="收款人/收款单位开户行" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_pay_type" label="报账方式" notNull="true" enumValues="应付款（网银）|应付款（网银）;应付款（票据）|应付款（票据）;预付款（网银）|预付款（网银）;预付款（票据）|预付款（票据）" type="String" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_total" label="合同总金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_paid" label="已支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_pay" label="此次支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c70c50a0493ce" label="合同付款条款 （详见合同扫描件） " type="RTF" length="1000000" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_content" label="合同履行情况说明" type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_purchase_link" label="1、 采购项目执行审批流程链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_paid_link" label="2、 历次付款申请流程的链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_archived_link" label="3、 项目文档归档的链接： " type="String" length="" />
</model>

<model > <extendElementProperty name="fd_applicant" label="采购项目付款申请人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_apply_dept" label="申请部门" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_applicant_id" label="申请人工号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_applicant_phone" label="联系电话" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_apply_post" label="岗位" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" notNull="true" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentPost()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_POST);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_payment_milestone" label="付款阶段" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_project_manager" label="项目的经理" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_sci" label="是否为科研费用1" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|2" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3a1e75dab2a618" label="采购项目是否完工" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|2" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3b4ec96ec9b8e2" label="是否属于三重一大" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|2" type="Double" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_name" label="合同名称 " type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_no" label="合同编号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_xpm_id" label="XPM编号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_htz" label="是否有wbs" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_haswbs" label="是否有WBS" notNull="true" enumValues="是|YES;否|NO" type="String" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_pur_pay_req" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3bd52b0e2e75a0" label="项目编号" type="String" length="24" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="wbsCode" label="WBS编号" type="String" notNull="true" /><extendSimpleProperty name="wbsCode_name" label="WBS编号_name" type="String" notNull="true" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3be1c0f5e287c2" label="项目名称" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="department" label="WBS所属部门" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="departmentCode" label="WBS所属部门Code" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_internal_order" label="内部订单号" type="String" length="12" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pm" label="项目经理" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pmid" label="项目经理工号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_tax_total" label="含税金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_name" label="收款人/收款单位名称" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_bank" label="收款人/收款单位银行账号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_account" label="收款人/收款单位开户行" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_pay_type" label="报账方式" notNull="true" enumValues="应付款（网银）|应付款（网银）;应付款（票据）|应付款（票据）;预付款（网银）|预付款（网银）;预付款（票据）|预付款（票据）" type="String" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_total" label="合同总金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_paid" label="已支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_pay" label="此次支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3c55f896049f3a" label="合同付款条款 （详见合同扫描件） " type="String" length="undefined" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_content" label="合同履行情况说明" type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_purchase_link" label="1、 采购项目执行审批流程链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_paid_link" label="2、 历次付款申请流程的链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_archived_link" label="3、 项目文档归档的链接： " type="String" length="" />
</model>

<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_sci" label="是否为科研费用1" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|2" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3a1e75dab2a618" label="采购项目是否完工" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|2" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3b4ec96ec9b8e2" label="是否属于三重一大" notNull="true" enumValues="是|1;否|2" type="Double" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_name" label="合同名称 " type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_no" label="合同编号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_xpm_id" label="XPM编号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_is_htz" label="是否有wbs" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_haswbs" label="是否有WBS" notNull="true" enumValues="是|YES;否|NO" type="String" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_pur_pay_req" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3bd52b0e2e75a0" label="项目编号" type="String" length="24" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="wbsCode" label="WBS编号" type="String" notNull="true" /><extendSimpleProperty name="wbsCode_name" label="WBS编号_name" type="String" notNull="true" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3be1c0f5e287c2" label="项目名称" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="department" label="WBS所属部门" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="departmentCode" label="WBS所属部门Code" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_internal_order" label="内部订单号" type="String" length="12" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pm" label="项目经理" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pmid" label="项目经理工号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_tax_total" label="含税金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_name" label="收款人/收款单位名称" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_bank" label="收款人/收款单位银行账号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_account" label="收款人/收款单位开户行" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_pay_type" label="报账方式" notNull="true" enumValues="应付款（网银）|应付款（网银）;应付款（票据）|应付款（票据）;预付款（网银）|预付款（网银）;预付款（票据）|预付款（票据）" type="String" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_total" label="合同总金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_paid" label="已支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_pay" label="此次支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_item" label="合同付款条款 （详见合同扫描件） " type="RTF" length="1000000" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_content" label="合同履行情况说明" type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_purchase_link" label="1、 采购项目执行审批流程链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_paid_link" label="2、 历次付款申请流程的链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_archived_link" label="3、 项目文档归档的链接： " type="String" length="" />

<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3be1c0f5e287c2" label="项目名称" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="department" label="WBS所属部门" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="departmentCode" label="WBS所属部门Code" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_internal_order" label="内部订单号" type="String" length="12" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pm" label="项目经理" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pmid" label="项目经理工号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_tax_total" label="含税金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_name" label="收款人/收款单位名称" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_bank" label="收款人/收款单位银行账号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_account" label="收款人/收款单位开户行" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_pay_type" label="报账方式" notNull="true" enumValues="应付款（网银）|应付款（网银）;应付款（票据）|应付款（票据）;预付款（网银）|预付款（网银）;预付款（票据）|预付款（票据）" type="String" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_total" label="合同总金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_paid" label="已支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_pay" label="此次支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_item" label="合同付款条款 （详见合同扫描件） " type="RTF" length="1000000" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_content" label="合同履行情况说明" type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_purchase_link" label="1、 采购项目执行审批流程链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_paid_link" label="2、 历次付款申请流程的链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_archived_link" label="3、 项目文档归档的链接： " type="String" length="" />
</model>

<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3be1c0f5e287c2" label="项目名称" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="department" label="WBS所属部门" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="departmentCode" label="WBS所属部门Code" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_internal_order" label="内部订单号" type="String" length="12" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pm" label="项目经理" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pmid" label="项目经理工号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_tax_total" label="含税金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_name" label="收款人/收款单位名称" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_bank" label="收款人/收款单位银行账号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_account" label="收款人/收款单位开户行" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_pay_type" label="报账方式" notNull="true" enumValues="应付款（网银）|应付款（网银）;应付款（票据）|应付款（票据）;预付款（网银）|预付款（网银）;预付款（票据）|预付款（票据）" type="String" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_total" label="合同总金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_paid" label="已支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_pay" label="此次支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_item" label="合同付款条款 （详见合同扫描件） " type="RTF" length="1000000" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_content" label="合同履行情况说明" type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_purchase_link" label="1、 采购项目执行审批流程链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_paid_link" label="2、 历次付款申请流程的链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_archived_link" label="3、 项目文档归档的链接： " type="String" length="" />
</model>

<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3be1c0f5e287c2" label="项目名称" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="department" label="WBS所属部门" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="departmentCode" label="WBS所属部门Code" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_internal_order" label="内部订单号" type="String" length="12" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pm" label="项目经理" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_wbs_pmid" label="项目经理工号" type="String" length="200" canDisplay="false" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_tax_total" label="含税金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_name" label="收款人/收款单位名称" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_bank" label="收款人/收款单位银行账号" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_vendor_account" label="收款人/收款单位开户行" type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_pay_type" label="报账方式" notNull="true" enumValues="应付款（网银）|应付款（网银）;应付款（票据）|应付款（票据）;预付款（网银）|预付款（网银）;预付款（票据）|预付款（票据）" type="String" />
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_total" label="合同总金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_paid" label="已支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_pay" label="此次支付金额" type="Double" length="10" scale="2" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_item" label="合同付款条款 （详见合同扫描件） " type="RTF" length="1000000" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_contract_content" label="合同履行情况说明" type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_purchase_link" label="1、 采购项目执行审批流程链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_paid_link" label="2、 历次付款申请流程的链接： " type="String" length="" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_archived_link" label="3、 项目文档归档的链接： " type="String" length="" />
</model>
